title: IRT scoring procedures for TIMSS data
author: Camilli, Dossey
description: Graphical abstractSampling units are pairs of TIMSS jackknife zones. Aggregated θ and its corresponding SE are estimated with sampling weights.

steps_raw.title: Aggregate factor analysis
steps_raw.instruction: The data were then analyzed with the aggregate model of Camilli and Fox [1]. The goal of exploratory factor analysis at the higher-order level is to discover clusters of items that perform similarly across countries. The clusters are identified by expert interpretation of a loading matrix resulting from an exploratory factor analysis, and then scores are derived that correspond the factor structure. In short, the clusters are the “factors” of factor analysis, and the empirical subscores are factor scores.
